summary: Iteration 17 - Tested new endpoints /api/user/stats and /api/user/library. Found and FIXED a datetime bug in /api/user/library. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend pages (Bibliothèque and Profil) correctly call the APIs.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed datetime timezone bug in /api/user/library (line 1318-1319): MongoDB stores naive datetimes, but code was comparing with timezone-aware datetime. Added timezone.utc to naive datetimes.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 1318: added timezone handling for saved_at datetime)
seed_data_creation: Created test data for testuser@hikma.com: 2 in_progress audios, 1 completed audio, 2 favorites
context_for_next_testing_agent: User stats and library endpoints fully tested and working. Endpoints require authentication. Stats returns: courses_followed, listening_hours, favorites_count, completed_count, in_progress_count. Library returns: in_progress[], favorites[], completed[], global_progress. Both Bibliothèque (/tabs/bibliotheque) and Profil (/tabs/profil) pages correctly integrate with these APIs. Test data exists for testuser@hikma.com with progress and favorites.

bug_fix_applied.issue: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added timezone.utc to naive datetime: if saved_at.tzinfo is None: saved_at = saved_at.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)

response_structure.courses_followed: int - count of unique courses user has progress on
response_structure.listening_hours: float - total hours listened based on progress * duration
response_structure.in_progress_count: int - count of episodes with 1-95% progress

response_structure.in_progress: array of audio items with progress data
response_structure.favorites: array of favorited audio items with saved_date
response_structure.global_progress: int 0-100 - average progress across all items

/bibliotheque.displays: User profile, global progress %, tabs (En cours/Favoris/Terminés), episode cards with progress bars

/profil.displays: User info, stats row (Cours suivis, Temps d'écoute, Contenus sauvegardés), academic level badge
